info.title: SolarIncentives API
info.description: Clean-energy incentive platform — projects, multi-step applications, status workflows, documents, notifications.

put.summary: Save a wizard step (draft when complete=false, strict when true)

post.summary: Provision a contractor + user account (admin only)

delete.summary: Delete a contractor (admin only; blocked if it has projects)

get.summary: Lightweight customer picker list (contractor or admin)

post.summary: Provision a customer + user account (admin only)

delete.summary: Delete a customer (admin only; blocked if it has projects)

post.summary: Upload a document to an application
Upload a document to a project

get.summary: Stream a private document (temporary signed URL — no token)

post.summary: Create the (single) application for a project

get.summary: Show an application with steps and documents

delete.summary: Delete a draft application (blocked once submitted)

post.summary: Submit the application (requires all steps complete + a document)
Mark all of the caller's notifications read
Create a project (contractor owns it; admin passes contractor_id)

get.summary: Show a project with battery systems, documents and application

put.summary: Update a project (status changes go through /transition)

delete.summary: Delete a project (blocked once its application is in review/funded)

patch.summary: Change a user's role (admin only; backfills profile)
